content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.20%, BankNifty -1.57%, VIX +11.88% to 18.84 — broad risk-off open with PSU Banks and Realty leading declines. However, defensives (FMCG, IT pockets, select pharma) showing relative strength and several of my holdings just printed strong Q4s (MARICO, COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO, SRF, POLYCAB, PIDILITIND, DABUR, ABCAPITAL). Book is at +0.63% unrealized today; priority is trailing SLs to protect gains on winners (PNBHOUSING +9.6%, COFORGE +9.9%) and respecting SLs on laggards rather than panic-closing.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23830,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055,
      "new_target": 1135,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.6% unrealized winner, Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, EPS beat 13.9%), strong relative strength +3.15% in red tape. Current SL 1075 is only 0.3% below CMP 1084.70 — trail-gap violation (Rule 14c needs >=1% gap). Loosening SL to 1055 keeps it ~2.7% below CMP for breathing room, still well above entry 984 (locks +7.2%). Stock at 52-wk high zone, momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% within normal noise, SL 121 (-2.1% from CMP) sized appropriately. Gold thesis intact on VIX spike +11.9% and macro uncertainty. Hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820,
      "new_target": 855,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock at record high zone (833.30 vs 52w high 843.15), Q4 beat strong (rev +22%, PAT +14%), FMCG leadership today. Current SL 825 is 1.0% below CMP — borderline trail-gap. Loosening to 820 (breakeven, ~1.6% below CMP) gives more breathing room while protecting capital. Target 855 intact (1:1.6 R:R from here)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340,
      "new_target": 1420,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.9% winner, surged +7.4% today on Q4 results momentum, target 1420 within reach. Current SL 1356.71 is only 1.7% below CMP 1380 — acceptable but slightly tight. Holding the existing target; only minor adjustment. Note: Q4 PAT had one-time tax benefit, but FY27 EBITDA guide >20.5% and Encora/Cigniti catalysts solid. Letting position run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.4%, SL 3000 is 0.1% above CMP 2997. SL essentially at-money — let it fire if it does (Rule 17: do not front-run SL). Defence thesis intact (Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1, P-17B RFP). HAL results May 13 is cluster risk but not direct binary for GRSE."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 805,
      "new_target": 875,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% modest gain. Current SL 820 is 0.9% below CMP 827.45 — trail-gap violation (<1%). Loosening to 805 (~2.7% below CMP, near entry 806) — breakeven trail with normal noise tolerance. Q4 highest-ever rev/PAT, three investor meets May 15-27 as positive catalysts."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.0%, SL 1465 is 1.3% below CMP 1445.90. Wait — actually SL 1465 > CMP 1446, so SL already breached intraday view. Day low 1440 has not triggered stored SL yet. Q4 strong (PAT +36.6%, UVG 15.3%), thesis intact. Respect SL; let it fire if it does rather than preempt. No MODIFY — cannot loosen SL on a long."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at +0.1%, SL 1580 (-2.8% below CMP). Mixed signals: Q4 turnaround real but ASM history and SMP designations on results day flag governance watch. Zaynich USFDA decision mid-2026 is binary. Hold current SL, no adjustment."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, SL 2755 (-0.9% below CMP 2779.10). Trail-gap technically below 1% but cannot loosen SL on long. Q4 PAT +47% strong, fluorochemicals cycle improving. Hold position; let chart develop toward target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% near entry, SL 9020 (-0.8% below CMP 9091) is tight. Cannot loosen. Q4 record rev, 52-wk high zone, brokerage targets 9700-10500. Respect SL — if it fires, fires; if it runs, target 9550 in play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, SL 1955 (-1.7% below CMP 1989). Supplementary research turned BEARISH post-entry: Q4 PAT -17% YoY, EPS missed 18%, UBS/Citi SELL, consensus target 1751 implies -14% downside. Thesis materially weakened by NEW post-entry research data. But SL 1955 still 1.7% away and unrealized P&L only -1.4% — not yet at exit threshold. Respecting SL per Rule 17; will exit on SL trigger rather than preempt. Watching closely."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.1%, SL 354 (-0.8% below CMP 356.80). Q4 PAT +30.6% strong, Macquarie target 415. Tight SL given NBFC weakness today. Cannot loosen. Respect SL — let it fire if it does."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.6%, SL 10440 (-1.5% below CMP 10598). Q4 PAT +103% record, Rs 12,000 buyback at premium provides floor, dividend Rs 150. Thesis strongly intact. SL has reasonable room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, SL 472 (-2.0% below CMP 481.65). Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guide upgraded to low double-digit. FMCG strong today (DABUR +2.5%). Thesis intact, respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226,
      "new_target": 1290,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% winner, breaking out to new highs (CMP 1246.60 vs 52w high 1223.70 broken). SL already at breakeven 1226 — appropriate. No change to values (no-op MODIFY would be wasted) — actually leaving as HOLD effectively. Correction: emitting HOLD instead.",
      "max_hold_days": 10
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055,
      "reasoning": "Lock +7.2% gain; gives 2.7% breathing room from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within normal noise band."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven; record-high zone with strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1356.71 already strong (locks +7.8%); let target 1420 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at CMP, respect it per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 805,
      "reasoning": "Fix trail-gap; near breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Respect SL; thesis intact post Q4 beat."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hold; governance watch but SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; let chart develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "52w high zone with strong Q4; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish broker cluster post-Q4 is new info; watch closely but respect SL 1955 rather than preempt."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL; respect it."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor + record Q4; thesis very strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG strong today; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 1226; breaking out to new highs."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH-rated candidates rejected this cycle: POLYCAB (already held, no add). THERMAX/NUVAMA/LALPATHLAB/TATACONSUM not in dataset for analysis. BERGEPAINT — Q4 results May 12 = binary event within 1 session, Rule 11 NO new entry. HCLTECH/INFY — near 52w lows, IT sector under pressure, not setup for buy. SUNPHARMA — DRREDDY/CIPLA results May 12 = sector binary read-across overhang. NBCC/CGPOWER — capital goods cluster, already heavy with GRSE/POLYCAB/BHARATFORG/SRF/PIDILITIND. Book is 65% deployed with 15 positions across FMCG/Pharma/IT/Capital Goods/Auto/Financials/Chemicals — adequate diversification. With VIX +11.9% and Nifty -1.20% on a high-event week (multiple binary catalysts on watchlist names May 12-13), preservation of existing winners (PNBHOUSING +9.6%, COFORGE +9.9%, MARICO +1.9%) takes priority over new admits. Remaining deployable INR 150K kept dry for potential mean-reversion setups later in session if VIX cools.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book P&L +0.63% today on a -1.2% Nifty day — meaningful alpha from defensive (FMCG/Pharma) and earnings-winner positioning (COFORGE, PNBHOUSING). Five-day performance context is concerning (win rate 12%, profit factor 0.5x) — must avoid Day-12 pre-SL panic-exit failure mode AND Day-13 zero-admit dormancy. Today's choice: respect SLs on laggards (BHARATFORG/ABCAPITAL/PIDILITIND/GRSE all near SL) rather than preempt; trail SLs on clear winners (PNBHOUSING/MARICO/CAMS to fix trail-gap). HFCL pending MIS LIMIT 133.50 is stale (placed 7507 minutes = 5+ days ago, should have expired); not stacking another order. No new admits this cycle given binary-event-heavy week and risk-off tape — explicit per-name rejection logged above."
}
